title: Outage Surge Customer-Comms Template
content: Use this template when customer-comms acknowledges a surge of duplicate outage signals. Message: We have opened incident {incident_id} for the reported outage and are attaching related signals as reports so the incident magnitude stays accurate. Engineering is investigating. We will share confirmed updates when available. Do not include an estimated restoration time unless engineering has published one as a source record. Include safety guidance only from an approved SOP and cite the source record in the internal sitrep.
snippet: Customer-comms template for outage surge acknowledgments without uncited restoration estimates.

title: Life-Safety Acknowledgment Template
content: Use this template for SEV1 life-safety acknowledgments after escalation is triggered. Message: We received your report and escalated it for immediate human review. If anyone is in immediate danger, contact emergency services now. Do not echo PII from the signal. Do not provide technical instructions beyond approved safety language. The internal sitrep must cite the signal, the routing decision, and the applicable SOP before stating facts about the hazard.
snippet: SEV1 customer-comms acknowledgment with PII discipline and citation-grounded sitrep requirements.

title: All-Clear Resolution Message Template
content: Send an all-clear resolution message only after every open incident related to the event is resolved and every SLA clock is satisfied. Message: Incident {incident_id} is resolved and the ClearBoard has returned to all-clear for this event. Thank you for the reports; each signal helped confirm incident magnitude. Do not say hazards are gone unless field-operations or engineering has published a source record confirming resolution. The final sitrep must cite the incident record and confirming source record.
snippet: All-clear message template tied to resolved incidents, satisfied SLA clocks, and cited confirmation.
